title: Interplanetary Missions
shortSummary: Going beyond Earth orbit — interplanetary trajectory design, gravity assists, deep-space navigation, and the challenges of reaching Mars and beyond.
whyItMatters: Interplanetary flight is the ultimate test of every discipline in rocket science. The delta-v requirements, communication delays, and mission durations push every system to its limits. SpaceX's Starship is being designed specifically for Mars — this is where the frontier lives.
coreConcepts: Entry, descent, and landing on other worlds
